governance.failed_stage_policy: Preserve the failed run and add only the minimum next-stage physics; do not tune upstream particles, enlarge a theory-bounded aperture, or move the target in post-processing.
governance.sample_policy: Use deterministic N=100 for candidate function checks and N=1000 only after the N=100 gate passes. S0 reuses existing N=100 source evidence without a solver rerun.

stages.name: direct_boundary_data_reference
stages.model: Zero-length virtual boundary in the shared instrument frame; retain the RF-to-oa axis rotation, particle identity, three clocks and first-forward-crossing event, but do not propagate across a physical gap.
inputs: existing COMSOL and SIMION RF N=100 source-exit evidence
tests: canonical event conversion and source hashes
no downstream aperture clipping at the RF exit
stages.exit_gate: Both source datasets produce deterministic, lossless virtual-entry events and identical schema semantics.
stages.claim_limit: Data-path reference only; particles still encounter the closed oaTOF shield in the real geometry.

stages.name: coincident_open_port_no_oa_pulse_reference
stages.model: Simplest physical topology: coaxial nominal alignment, RF exit mating directly to a parameterized oa shield opening, zero modeled inter-component gap, no tube, lens or steering electrode. Retain the time-dependent upstream RF basis and the always-on oa electrostatic basis on one joint geometry, but do not add an oa extraction pulse.
prerequisites: theory-bounded aperture with a frozen minimum geometric transmission per source case
parameterized oa shield port in COMSOL, SIMION and CAD candidate geometry
common electrical reference and a single joint-field implementation
tests: N=100 target-entry crossing and downstream detector acceptance
stages.exit_gate: Aperture, field and N=100 functional gates pass without an independent connector component.
stages.claim_limit: Ideal direct-mating reference with upstream RF retained and no oa extraction pulse; no finite gap, tube, pulse capture or assembly tolerance claim.

stages.name: passive_grounded_connector
stages.model: Add only the measured finite separation and a passive grounded vacuum tube or housing; no active focusing or steering.
prerequisites: S1 completed or demonstrated physically infeasible
frozen gap, tube length, aperture, alignment datum and leakage limit
tests: three-dimensional joint electrostatic and RF fringe field
field-mesh and PA-resolution convergence at both ends
stages.exit_gate: Passive geometry meets the frozen functional and field-leakage limits.
stages.claim_limit: Passive transport with upstream RF and always-on downstream fields retained; no oa extraction-pulse capture claim.

stages.name: time_resolved_pulse_capture
stages.model: Retain the accepted passive geometry and add the minimum frozen oa extraction waveform, trigger rule, rise/fall model and three-dimensional capture volume on the shared instrument clock.
prerequisites: frozen pulse waveform and capture acceptance contract
tests: N=100 capture, target-entry and detector acceptance
stages.exit_gate: Time-resolved N=100 capture and downstream acceptance pass in the frozen passive geometry.
stages.claim_limit: Nominal alignment only; no active correction or tolerance qualification.

stages.name: conditional_active_optics_and_tolerances
stages.model: Add steering or focusing electrodes only if S2/S3 prove the passive interface cannot meet a frozen requirement; then evaluate nominal offsets and assembly-error variables without retuning the source.
prerequisites: documented passive-interface failure tied to a frozen requirement
approved active-variable envelope and high-voltage constraints
tests: N=100 functional acceptance and selected convergence repeats
stages.exit_gate: The minimum active design has a bounded operating and assembly tolerance region.
stages.claim_limit: Candidate design only; not formal until S5.

stages.name: cross_solver_cad_candidate_closure
stages.model: Freeze the simplest passing topology from S1-S4 and build the same contract in COMSOL, SIMION and SolidWorks.
prerequisites: frozen geometry, waveform, tolerances, acceptance metrics and source dataset
tests: N=1000 statistical confirmation after N=100 PASS
COMSOL GUI Compute, SIMION GUI package and SolidWorks assembly synchronization
formal asset and result manifest generation
stages.exit_gate: Both solvers, CAD and the formal manifest gate pass the same frozen interface contract.
stages.claim_limit: Formal connection may be claimed only after explicit promotion; prior stages never modify current formal assets.
